headline: Expedia Group Posts Q1 Earnings & Revenue Beat on Strong B2B Growth
summary: EXPE's B2B revenues jump 25% in Q1, fueling earnings and sales beats as enterprise travel demand and global scale strengthen.

raw.headline: Expedia Group Posts Q1 Earnings & Revenue Beat on Strong B2B Growth

headline: Assessing Expedia Group (EXPE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Expedia Group (EXPE) has seen mixed share performance recently, with the stock down over the past week and month, but higher over the past year and past 3 months. This has given investors a varied return profile. The company operates a broad travel platform that includes B2C brands such as Brand Expedia, Hotels.com, Vrbo and Orbitz. It also has a B2B segment that supplies travel inventory and technology to partners, and a metasearch business...

headline: Susquehanna Maintains Neutral on Expedia Group, Raises Price Target to $250

headline: Expedia and CarTrawler May Be Close to a Deal Following a Meeting in Dublin: Scoop
summary: Is Expedia reverting to the deal appetite it displayed in 2015 when it acquired Travelocity, Orbitz and Homeaway? After acquiring Tiqets in February, Expedia could be looking to make another B2B move.
